Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Uncrowned]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — The top eight fighters in the tournament receive the mark of the Uncrowned, a unique tattoo of a broken crown that anchors to the spirit.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Uncrowned are those who reach the top eight in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Uncrowned are eight individuals honored from the final elimination round.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The final selection round reveals the true Uncrowned Kings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Uncrowned is a tournament featuring single-elimination duels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The tournament determines which eight Uncrowned are chosen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Winning a round earns the right to become one of the Uncrowned.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The Uncrowned is an upcoming event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sha Miara was expected to be among the Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Two of the eight Uncrowned are going to be Blackflame Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Eliminated Uncrowned competitors were aboard the Akura cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — The Uncrowned is a group with remaining spots to be filled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Uncrowned is a title or status recognized by others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Blacksword is virtually guaranteed a spot among the Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — The Uncrowned tournament is currently in its fourth round.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Uncrowned are a group of individuals being selected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Uncrowned is a tournament held in an arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Uncrowned possess a unique signature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Uncrowned is a rank or status Lindon does not yet have.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Uncrowned have been separated for the fifth round due to increased security.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Uncrowned are allowed to interact outside of matches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Only the Uncrowned and their sponsors are allowed in the waiting rooms behind the arenas.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Reigan Shen claimed responsibility for three of the eight Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Four enemy Uncrowned were behind Lindon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
